market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
articles.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

articles.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
articles.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/4: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
articles.description: Bitcoin has broken above the $79,500 level, backed by solid buying by institutional investors. Will the altcoins also follow?

articles.title: Hut 8 swaps Coinbase loan for cheaper FalconX deal, slashing borrowing costs as it bets big on AI
articles.description: A new $200 million, 364-day bitcoin-backed facility replaces the Coinbase Credit arrangement, cutting debt costs by 200 basis points.

articles.title: Hackers are still exploiting the cPanel bug to gain control of thousands of websites
articles.description: Days after the disclosure of a critical vulnerability in popular web hosting software cPanel and WHM, hackers keep targeting and hacking websites.

articles.title: Circle, Coinbase lead crypto stocks rally amid Clarity Act progress, bitcoin hitting $80,000
articles.description: The market is starting to price in potential winners as stablecoin yield compromise opens path for passing key U.S. digital asset regulation, one analyst said.

articles.title: Bitcoin bounces around $80K as Iran strike unsettles crypto, risk assets
articles.description: Bitcoin faced new volatility and a new struggle to reclaim $80,000 as Iran events added pressure to crypto and risk assets.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
articles.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

articles.title: Prediction markets entering institutional era after first block trade — Bernstein
articles.description: Institutional investors are entering prediction markets as block trades, custom contracts and US regulatory shifts reshape a sector still dominated by retail users.

articles.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
articles.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

articles.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
articles.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

articles.title: Ethereum holders are back in profit as ETH price chart targets $3K
articles.description: Ethereum investors are no longer in the red, increasing the chances of a rally to $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay recovery.

articles.title: The government should promote innovation, not punish it
articles.description: District Attorney of Sacramento County, Ho argues that ambiguous rules and enforcement practices, such as those for crypto, lead to confusion, rather than seeking clarity in the law to further growth.

articles.title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
articles.description: Tetra Trust's new stablecoin, CADD, is aimed at institutional use for 24/7 cross-border settlement, real-time corporate treasury, and direct fintech transfers, replacing legacy batch systems.

articles.title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
articles.description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
articles.description: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

articles.title: Wall Street giant DTCC plans tokenized securities platform with July pilot, October launch
articles.description: Clearing giant's move toward live tokenization market adds weight to Wall Street's blockchain push.

articles.title: K Wave Media abandons Bitcoin treasury push for AI infrastructure
articles.description: K Wave Media is redirecting up to $485 million from a Bitcoin treasury strategy into AI infrastructure, alongside debt reduction and restructuring, per a Form 6-K filing.

articles.title: ZIGChain Summit 2026 marks a defining moment for onchain finance as ecosystem unites around execution, partnerships
articles.description: ZIGChain, the blockchain built to bring regulated investment products onchain for everyday users, today reflected on its second annual ZIGChain Summit, a defining gathering for the future of onchain finance, held on 28 April at the The Meydan Hotel, Dubai.
